Title: User logs into the Service and navigates to the HomePage
Preconditions: User is registered and has credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User enters the username and password.
2. User clicks on the login button.
3. System verifies the credentials.
4. User is redirected to the HomePage.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the HomePage.

Title: User attempts to log in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User is registered but enters incorrect credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User enters the username and password.
2. User clicks on the login button.
3. System verifies the credentials.
4. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: User is not logged in and sees an error message indicating incorrect credentials.

Title: User creates a new object
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to create objects.
Test Steps:
1. User selects the "Create" option from the Menu.
2. User enters the name of the new object.
3. User clicks on the "Create" button.
4. System validates the input.
5. System creates the new object.
Expected Result: A new object is created and displayed in the system.

Title: User attempts to create a new object with an empty name
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to create objects.
Test Steps:
1. User selects the "Create" option from the Menu.
2. User enters an empty name for the new object.
3. User clicks on the "Create" button.
4. System validates the input.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the object name cannot be empty.

Title: User navigates through the Menu options
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User selects an option from the Menu.
2. System processes the selected option.
3. User is redirected to the appropriate page or action.
Expected Result: User is correctly redirected to the appropriate page or action based on the selected option.

Title: User attempts to select an invalid option from the Menu
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User selects the "InvalidOption" from the Menu.
2. System processes the selection.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the selected option is invalid.

Title: User selects the "Create" option from the Menu
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User selects the "Create" option from the Menu.
2. System processes the selection.
3. User is prompted to enter the name of the new object.
4. User enters the name of the new object.
5. User clicks on the "Create" button.
6. System validates the input.
7. System creates the new object.
Expected Result: A new object is created and displayed in the system.

Title: User selects the "Logout" option from the Menu
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User selects the "Logout" option from the Menu.
2. System processes the selection.
3. User is logged out.
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: User attempts to select the "Logout" option while not logged in
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User selects the "Logout" option from the Menu.
2. System processes the selection.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the user is not logged in.

Title: User attempts to navigate to the Menu while not logged in
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User tries to access the Menu.
2. System checks if the user is logged in.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the login page.
